mutations.description: Remind agent to retain file contents across turns
mutations.patch: File cache: you've already read files this session. Don't re-read unless content changed. Use your context.

mutations.description: Use lower effort for routine/evaluation turns
mutations.change: Add effort cycling: high for implementation, medium for continuation, low for evaluation
mutations.estimated_save: 500-2000 tokens/session from reduced thinking on routine turns

mutations.description: Enable proactive pacing before rate limit walls
